seo.description: Johny William de Oliveira Alves, Senior Software Engineer with 20+ years of experience delivering scalable solutions in fintech, telecom, and consumer goods. He led high-impact projects for clients like Coca-Cola and Anbima, building systems for millions of users. Expert in React, Node.js, TypeScript, and CI/CD, with a strong focus on performance optimization and team mentorship. Currently expanding into machine learning and eager to contribute to international SaaS product teams.
seo.headline: Senior Front-End Engineer | React & Next.js Specialist | Tech Mentor | SaaS & Fintech Focus

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: Can I help you with anything? Do you have any questions or suggestions? Get in touch via social media or send an email. I'll be happy to answer.

coverLetter: I would like to introduce myself as a senior frontend developer with over 20 years of experience in creating user interfaces and working with various technologies. I am currently seeking a new opportunity and would love to work with a team of engaged and collaborative people.

Throughout my career, I have had the opportunity to work with a wide range of technologies, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, and many others. This has allowed me to develop a deep understanding of frontend development best practices, as well as the ability to learn new technologies quickly.

One of the things that motivates me most as a developer is producing knowledge and sharing what I've learned with teammates and the broader community. I firmly believe that knowledge sharing is essential for a healthy and collaborative work environment.

If you are looking for a senior frontend developer with a passion for learning, growing, and working as part of a team, I would be a great candidate for your company. Thank you in advance for the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your company's success.

list.role: Front-End Technical Lead | React & Next.js Specialist
highlights: Built and led development of scalable full-stack platforms with React, Next.js and Firebase

• Founded and developed TCG RP: Architected and built a comprehensive event management and organization platform from the ground up using React, Next.js, and a Contentful with monorepo, resulting in a scalable and maintainable web solution.

• Engineered a dual-platform ecosystem: Developed both a public-facing interface and a secure administrative area, integrating Firebase for real-time data synchronization and user management, streamlining back-office operations.

• Created an end-to-end certification system: Designed and implemented a full-stack certification and tracking platform using React, Next.js, Express, and Contentful, enabling automated certificate issuance and progress monitoring for trainees.

• Established internal training programs: Led front-end development training and consulting sessions, empowering teams to master React and Next.js, which accelerated project delivery and improved code quality across the organization.

list.role: Senior Front-End Engineer | React & Next.js Specialist
highlights: Architected modular brokerage platform with hybrid Next.js architecture (SSR/CSR)
• Architected a modular brokerage management platform using a hybrid Next.js architecture (SSR/CSR), ensuring high performance, scalability, and an optimized user experience for brokers.
• Built a reusable component library with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, guaranteeing design consistency across the platform and accelerating development velocity for new features.
• Improved code quality and team capability by leading technical reviews (Core Review), enforcing coding standards, and mentoring junior developers in React and Next.js best practices.
• Developed interactive analytical dashboards with Recharts, transforming complex data into clear visual insights for business stakeholders.

list.role: Senior Front-End Technical Lead | React & Next.js Specialist
list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: Architected and launched Seguralta Core insurance platform with React, Next.js, and FastAPI

• Architected and launched Seguralta Core, a comprehensive insurance brokerage platform built with React, Next.js, and FastAPI, providing franchisees with real-time access to commissions, renewals, and policy expiration data, streamlining critical business operations.

• Established a scalable front-end architecture by implementing a reusable component library with bit.dev/bit.cloud and Storybook, ensuring design consistency and accelerating development velocity across multiple projects.

• Drove engineering excellence and team growth by mentoring junior developers, leading code reviews, enforcing GitFlow workflows, and championing Scrum methodologies to foster a high-performance culture.

• Engineered a robust quality and monitoring ecosystem: Integrated New Relic for performance monitoring, SonarQube for code quality analysis, and comprehensive testing (Jest, Testing Library, Cypress), while automating deployments with BitBucket Pipelines to optimize Core Web Vitals and ensure system reliability.

list.role: Senior Front-End Engineer | React & Next.js Specialist
highlights: Architected micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation in a monorepo

• Architected and developed the front-end for CREA-SP's electronic ART platform, enabling engineering professionals across São Paulo to submit and manage Technical Responsibility Notes for works and services through a modern, intuitive digital interface.

• Designed and implemented a micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation within a monorepo, ensuring modularity, scalability, and the ability for multiple teams to develop and deploy features independently.
• Built reusable, type-safe components with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, establishing a solid foundation for continuous platform evolution and maintainability.
• Created a consistent, accessible UI library with Chakra UI, accelerating development and delivering a professional, responsive user experience across all platform modules.
• Managed the full development lifecycle in Azure DevOps, including version control, CI/CD pipelines, and automated quality checks, ensuring reliable and efficient releases.

list.role: Senior Front-End Engineer | CI&T Client Delivery

clients.name: Anbima – Greenfield Platform Development
highlights: • Architected and launched a comprehensive financial data platform for Anbima from the ground up using React and Next.js, creating a modern system for collecting and publishing managed portfolio information with strict regulatory compliance.

• Implemented hybrid rendering strategies (SSR for SEO-critical financial content, CSR for interactive dashboards), significantly improving page load times, Core Web Vitals, and organic search visibility for financial product data.
• Designed reusable component libraries with React and TypeScript, ensuring consistency, maintainability, and rapid development of new features.
• Engineered robust data validation workflows and integrated with back-end APIs using optimized data fetching strategies to deliver real-time portfolio information.

clients.name: Coca-Cola – Platform Maintenance & Evolution
highlights: • Provided ongoing maintenance and multilingual support for Coca-Cola's promotional platforms across Latin America and the Caribbean, serving millions of users in 20+ countries within the Adobe Experience Manager (AEM) ecosystem.
• Managed multilingual content workflows in AEM, coordinating translations and regional adaptations for Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, Colombia, and Caribbean markets.
• Delivered critical production support during high-traffic promotional campaigns, ensuring rapid incident response, front-end fixes, and 99.9% uptime.
• Implemented front-end enhancements with Vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS to improve user experience, mobile responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility.
• Collaborated with AWS infrastructure teams and leveraged GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines for reliable multi-country deployments.
Zarp Localiza Platform – Technology Restructuring & SEO Optimization

• Led the complete technology and infrastructure restructuring of the Zarp Localiza platform, migrating to React and Next.js to establish a modern, scalable architecture that improved developer productivity and platform performance.

• Drove SEO strategy to achieve #1 organic rankings: Implemented comprehensive optimizations including semantic HTML, structured data, Next.js SSR, and Core Web Vitals improvements that propelled the platform to top positions in organic search results, driving significant growth in organic traffic.

• Championed CI/CD adoption with Azure DevOps: Introduced and implemented automated build, test, and deployment pipelines in Azure DevOps, reducing release cycles, minimizing manual errors, and enabling rapid iteration on features and SEO enhancements.

• Optimized user experience and the sales funnel: Leveraged Hotjar (heatmaps, session recordings) and Datadog (performance monitoring) to analyze user behavior, identify friction points, and implement UX improvements that positively impacted conversion rates.

• Selected and standardized front-end technologies: Led the technology selection process, establishing React, Next.js, and TypeScript as the core stack, ensuring code quality, reusability, and long-term maintainability across the platform.
Invillia Apps Suite – Team Management & Remote Work Platform

• Developed full-stack features for the Invillia Apps Suite, a platform designed to optimize team management and remote work, working across front-end (React, TypeScript, Redux, D3.js) and back-end (Node.js, Express, MySQL).
• Engineered integration with Microsoft Teams, enabling seamless access to team management tools, attendance tracking, and productivity metrics within the corporate communication platform.
• Optimized memory usage across React components and Redux state management, profiling and refactoring to eliminate leaks and improve stability for long-running remote work sessions.
• Built interactive data visualizations with D3.js, creating dashboards that displayed team performance, productivity trends, and resource allocation to support data-driven management decisions.
• Designed and delivered RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, ensuring reliable data delivery from optimized MySQL databases to front-end applications.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: Led the development of a unified healthcare portal that consolidated patient services, implemented secure Java/Spring Boot authentication, automated CI/CD pipelines, and integrated third-party services while establishing real-time monitoring to enhance security, efficiency, and user experience.

• Delivered a unified digital experience for healthcare beneficiaries: Led the development of a portal that consolidated financial management, exam scheduling, and appointment booking, empowering patients to manage their healthcare needs in one place.
• Improved security and user access: Implemented a robust authentication API with Java and Spring Boot, ensuring secure access to sensitive health and financial data for thousands of beneficiaries.

• Enabled proactive system monitoring: Deployed Grafana dashboards that provided real-time visibility into system health, API performance, and user activity, reducing mean time to detection (MTTD) for incidents.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: Promoter Tracking Platform & JBS Analytics

• Managed and developed a web and mobile back-office platform for tracking promoters at retail locations, building React Native mobile applications for field staff and ASP.NET MVC web dashboards for operations teams.

• Delivered data visualization dashboards for JBS: Designed interactive dashboards that tracked promoter performance and retail results, enabling JBS stakeholders to monitor KPIs and make data-driven decisions in real-time.

• Engineered ETL processes for partner data integration: Developed and maintained Pentaho ETL pipelines to load, transform, and integrate partner data into SQL databases, ensuring comprehensive reporting and analytics.

• Maintained end-to-end data infrastructure: Supported the entire data lifecycle from ETL processing to dashboard visualization, ensuring data accuracy, reliability, and timely availability for business intelligence.
• Developed across multiple technology stacks: Leveraged Java, .NET C#, Node.js, React Native, and Pentaho to deliver integrated solutions for promoter tracking and partner data integration.

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil

clients.name: Toyota Rodobens – Recall Customer Service Automation
highlights: • Led process automation and chatbot development for Toyota Rodobens recall campaigns using WDG Automation and Bizagi BPMN Modeler, streamlining customer notifications, appointment scheduling, and follow-up communications

• Structured end-to-end customer service projects for recall management, mapping optimized workflows that improved coordination, reduced manual effort, and enhanced the customer experience for affected vehicle owners
• Implemented RPA solutions that automated repetitive tasks, ensuring timely communication with vehicle owners and improving recall campaign effectiveness.

clients.name: Claro – Telemarketing Chrome Extension
highlights: • Developed a custom Google Chrome extension using JavaScript for Claro telemarketing teams, automating customer lookup, call logging, and data entry tasks.
• Boosted agent productivity by reducing manual work and enabling faster access to customer information, allowing agents to focus on customer engagement and increasing call efficiency.
• Integrated the extension with existing telemarketing systems and CRM tools, ensuring seamless data

list.location: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil
highlights: Mission-Critical ERP/CRM System – Fiscal, Accounting, Financial & Real Estate Management

• Provided maintenance, support, and continuous development for a comprehensive ERP and CRM system built with Delphi and Microsoft SQL Server, serving fiscal control, accounting, financial management, and real estate portfolio operations.
• Ensured system reliability and business continuity through proactive maintenance, timely bug fixes, and responsive user support, minimizing downtime and disruptions to critical business functions.
• Developed new features and modules across multiple domains, adapting the system to evolving business requirements in fiscal compliance, financial reporting, and real estate portfolio tracking.
• Optimized Microsoft SQL Server databases, designing efficient stored procedures, indexes, and queries to ensure fast data access, data integrity, and accurate reporting.
• Maintained and enhanced legacy Delphi code, balancing stability with performance improvements and new functionality to extend the system's useful life.
• Developed deep domain expertise in fiscal regulations, accounting principles, financial management, and real estate operations to effectively support and evolve the system.
